media.title: Instant observations: Labaron Philon Jr. and Summer Sixers drop to 2-1
media.description: Three of the 2026 Summer Sixers' first four games in Las Vegas are complete.

items.title: In his first legitimate game-like action since meniscus surgery, Johni Broome has put up double-doubles in two Sixers Summer League wins.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
In his first legitimate game-like action since meniscus surgery, Johni Broome has put up double-doubles in two Sixers Summer League wins. 

“My first season wasn’t the best. I can see that myself. That’s why I put in a lot of work.”

www.inquirer.com/sixers/johni...

media.title: After an unexpected setback, Johni Broome aims ‘to keep proving myself’ at Summer League
media.description: Broome played in 11 NBA games during a rookie season interrupted by knee surgery. He has recorded a double-double in each of the Sixers’ first two Summer League games in Las Vegas.

items.title: Johni Broome records another double-double vs. IND
items.author: NBC Sports
items.body_excerpt: Johni Broome records another double-double vs. IND NBC Sports

items.title: Jalen Slawson and Johni Broome exchange words there. Slawson has been wanting a foul call for basically the entire overtime and they got up close and personal.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Jalen Slawson and Johni Broome exchange words there. Slawson has been wanting a foul call for basically the entire overtime and they got up close and personal.

items.title: Another double-double for Johni Broome, who has 19 points in 10 rebounds. Got those last two boards by following his own miss twice (but failing to convert)
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt: Another double-double for Johni Broome, who has 19 points in 10 rebounds. Got those last two boards by following his own miss twice (but failing to convert)

items.title: I asked Philion about the rapport he and Johni Broome clearly have already built, after they playfully joined the media scrum to ask each other questions.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
I asked Philion about the rapport he and Johni Broome clearly have already built, after they playfully joined the media scrum to ask each other questions. 

"[Broome] can’t beat me in 2K. Any game on the console, he can’t mess with me." 

He's going to fit right in!

www.inquirer.com/sixers/sixer...

media.title: How the Sixers’ ‘kids’ bonded, then injected energy into the locker room
media.description: Outside belief that the Sixers are old and washed up is primarily used as a dig at the oft-injured Joel Embiid and Paul George. But these youngsters are debunking that notion.

items.title: The 2026 Summer Sixers, armed with only one player to appear in the NBA (Johni Broome, 55 minutes), are about to begin their slate of games in Las Vegas. Labaron Philon Jr. is the main attraction. Quite a few Exhibit 10 spots up for grabs among the rest of an interesting group.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: The 2026 Summer Sixers, armed with only one player to appear in the NBA (Johni Broome, 55 minutes), are about to begin their slate of games in Las Vegas. Labaron Philon Jr. is the main attraction. Quite a few Exhibit 10 spots up for grabs among the rest of an interesting group.

items.title: Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Here is the full summer league roster. Labaron Philon and Johni Broome are on it, and new two-way signees Caleb Love and Rayan Rupert are not. 

First game in Vegas is Thursday.

items.title: Sixers going with a rookie-heavy roster. Johni Broome is the only player with NBA experience.

items.body_excerpt: Sixers going with a rookie-heavy roster. Johni Broome is the only player with NBA experience.

media.description: The 2026 Summer Sixers are headlined by rookie first-round pick Labaron Philon Jr. and soon-to-be sophomore Johni Broome.

items.title: It'd be mildly surprising if the Sixers go into the season with Hukporti, Bona and Johni Broome as the top options to back up Joel Embiid. Feels like you could use a solid vet in that mix.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: It'd be mildly surprising if the Sixers go into the season with Hukporti, Bona and Johni Broome as the top options to back up Joel Embiid. Feels like you could use a solid vet in that mix.
